# CorridorKey by LateNite

> We're currently in a public beta testing phase. 👷

- [CorridorKey by LateNite](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/readme.md): CorridorKey by LateNite
- [Download](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/download.md): We're currently in a public beta testing phase on Apple's TestFlight.
- [System Requirements](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/system-requirements.md): CorridorKey by LateNite requires Final Cut Pro 11 or later on macOS 26 Tahoe.
- [How To Use](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/how-to-use.md): CorridorKey by LateNite is currently in a public beta testing phase. 👷
- [Support](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/support.md): The best place to get support is the FCP Cafe Discord.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/faq.md): CorridorKey is an open source project created by the talented Corridor Digital team.
- [Troubleshooting](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/troubleshooting.md): Apologies in advance if you have any trouble using CorridorKey by LateNite.
- [Release Notes](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/release-notes.md): 🎉 Released:
- [Uninstall](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/uninstall.md): To uninstall CorridorKey by LateNite, simply drag the application to the trash/bin.
- [Credits](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/credits.md): CorridorKey by LateNite has been thrown together by Chris at LateNite.
- [Privacy Policy](https://corridorkeybylatenite.fcp.cafe/privacy.md): This is the privacy policy for the CorridorKey by LateNite, macOS Application that is available on the macOS App Store and TestFlight.
